code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    string.trim(s)
  when None
    "0"
  end
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < string.len(line)
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        total = total + (b - 48)
      end
    when None
      total = total
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("digit_sum=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
